mapper.select: SELECT maTuyen, diemKhoiHanh, diemDen, khoangCach, thoiGianUocTinh, doPhucTap, maLuongTuyen FROM tuyenduong ORDER BY maTuyen
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tuyenduong (diemKhoiHanh, diemDen, khoangCach, thoiGianUocTinh, doPhucTap,maLuongTuyen) VALUES (#{diemKhoiHanh}, #{diemDen}, #{khoangCach}, #{thoiGianUocTinh}, #{doPhucTap}, #{maLuongTuyen})
mapper.update: UPDATE tuyenduong SET diemKhoiHanh = #{diemKhoiHanh}, diemDen = #{diemDen}, khoangCach = #{khoangCach}, thoiGianUocTinh = #{thoiGianUocTinh}, doPhucTap = #{doPhucTap}, maLuongTuyen = #{maLuongTuyen} WHERE maTuyen = #{maTuyen}
